handoffPurpose: Final EWShop import/backend/frontend/QA context for completed DB Exporter enhancement cycle.

abilities-codex: ability svgIcon metadata for exact AssetExporter ability-icons matches

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use emitted svgIcon only when source=ability-icons and key is present; render Combat role as public browse/filter metadata.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: If svgIcon is absent, show no inferred icon.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use rich stats for roster/profile display and rich evolution refs for upgrade navigation.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not compute live upkeep or infer missing evolution targets.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use publicDisplayName for Hero skill UI; keep displayName as source key/diagnostic.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not parse skill keys into labels.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use factions as the central rich join point for faction details and resolver enrichment.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not backfill missing joins from key prefixes.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use rich data for planning/resolver enrichment; public Codex can stay shallow unless product asks for planning facts.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not execute RPN costs or infer unlock timing from era/tier/prose.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use chapter/root evidence in Quest Explorer and route linking only.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not create generic Questline identity from duplicate titles or parsed quest keys.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Render formulas, current exported-game values, hold duration, and caveat clearly.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not create exact map-size tables unless future source-proven exports provide them.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Render as public reference pages from definition data.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not show live placement, owner, discovery, settlement, territory, GUID, or tile data.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Render Status polarity and public-safe status-to-status relationships where present.
Use Trait type as broad type and Category as secondary source category.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not infer missing Origin faction.

frontendBackendFieldMap.consumerGuidance: Use Action type for consistent display/filtering and Origin faction only when emitted with a ref.
frontendBackendFieldMap.fallbackRule: Do not infer owner/category from raw action names or implementation refs.

victoryConditions.frontendGuidance: Render formula, scaling inputs, current exported-game value, hold duration, and caveat. Any frontend-derived map-size examples must be labeled as examples or approximations.

dbExporterCurrentlyEmits: abilities-codex svgIcon with source=ability-icons and key=<UnitAbility entryKey>

assetExporterArtContract: all non-ability icons/art/portraits until a stable semantic asset contract exists
blockedByMissingSourceEvidence: ability ownership/origin without direct owner fields

noInferenceRules: Do not infer ownership, origin, grouping, progression, labels, mechanics, icons, portraits, art, references, questline identity, or victory thresholds from keys.
Do not infer from names, prose, duplicate titles, raw key fragments, SVG filenames, Unity paths, GUIDs, mapper names, or fuzzy matching.
Diagnostics-only exports are not normal public Codex imports.
Absence should remain absence unless DBExporter or AssetExporter emits source-proven data.
backendNotes: Register public Codex kinds including victorypaths-codex, victoryconditions-codex, and naturalwonders-codex.
Register/import factions rich export and expanded rich fields for resolver use.
Do not public-import diagnostics-only files by default.
Handle intentionally absent owner/icon/art fields null-safely.
Guard against empty public export kinds causing deletion; victoryconditions-codex now has 6 rows.
frontendNotes: Render Victory Condition formula/scaling/current-value/caveat facts clearly.
Use skills.publicDisplayName for Hero skill displays.
Use factions rich joins for faction detail enrichment.
Quest Explorer owns quest browsing; do not recreate branch/chapter navigation in Codex.
Prefer exact exported refs over resolver inference.
suggestedQaChecklist: Import rich exports used by resolvers.
Exclude diagnostics-only exports from normal public import.
Verify ability svgIcon refs resolve against AssetExporter ability-icons.
Verify Victory Conditions render formulas, current exported-game values, hold durations, and caveats.
Verify Quest Explorer chapter/root evidence without generic Questline Codex pages.
Verify sample pages for Ability, Equipment, Trait, Action, Status, Victory Condition, Natural Wonder, Faction, Unit, and Quest Explorer.
